vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only requires editing /etc/chrony.conf to remove non‑server time source directives and restarting the chronyd service. This is a straightforward configuration change that does not affect authentication, boot process, or critical filesystem layout, and it carries minimal risk of lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Incorrect NTP server configuration could cause time drift; Potential loss of time synchronization if no valid server is defined
